method: Application UI screenshot side-by-side visual review. API and sidecar metrics are supporting evidence only.

visual_findings: Generated view family and dimension density do not match the same-name reference.
Dense generated dimension cluster/callout placement reduces readability.
Notes and roughness area do not match the reference drawing layout.
Generated circular view and side/profile placement differ from the compact reference layout.
Callouts crowd around the circular feature instead of following the reference pattern.
Generated drawing includes a different composition and cannot be accepted from API pass evidence alone.
Generated view scale and placement differ from the two-view reference.
The prominent red reference warning note is missing in the generated drawing.
Generated notes and dimension evidence remain visually incomplete.
Generated drawing is already structurally need_review/fail for dimension coverage.
Circular-part dimensions and side-view placement differ from the reference.
Generated layout is sparse in some zones and crowded near the main circular view.
Generated drawing loses the dense machined-plate dimensioning pattern visible in the reference.
Main view scale and placement do not match the reference.
Hole/callout grouping is incomplete compared with the reference drawing.
Generated dimension chains dominate and cross the sheet instead of matching the reference layout.
View slots and annotation grouping differ from the same-name reference.
The generated drawing is not visually acceptable despite supporting API metrics.

acceptance_rule: Do not accept any of the six drawings until fresh generated PNGs pass explicit-base application UI screenshot review, one screenshot and one judgement per drawing.
